forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 70 in the afternoon. Southeast wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 2am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 2am and 3am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 3am and 4am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 48, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. Southeast wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
